# CWE-215 negative: debug log omits secret material
lang: go
file: CWE-215-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-215 Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Debugging Code (mitigated)
func DebugSession(c *gin.Context) {
	log.Printf("session debug path=%s method=%s", c.Request.URL.Path, c.Request.Method)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "logged"})
}
